title: Verdict
description: The Father agent's final ruling after evaluating the full debate transcript.

winner.description: The agent declared the more persuasive debater. Never null.

draw.description: Draws are prohibited. This field must always be false.

reasoning.description: Father's explanation of the verdict citing rubric scores.

turn_count.description: Total number of turns at the time of evaluation.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when the verdict was produced.
